---
title: " Analisis "
author: "Josue Jhonatan colunche Vasquez"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-expand: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    output-file: "ESM"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Project Setup

```{r}
#| label:  setup

source('https://inkaverse.com/setup.r')
```

# Data import

```{r}
gs <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1jhF2lV6rksG_t3W5OkBvq6jgzAiZ78nCOap2Bf8QarQ/edit?gid=1844291628#gid=1844291628" %>% 
  as_sheets_id()

fb <- gs %>% 
  range_read(ss = .,sheet = "fb")
```

# Research Objective

```{r}

fb <- fb %>%
  mutate(
    luz    = as.factor(luz),
    ntreat = as.factor(ntreat),
    rep    = as.factor(rep),
    plots  = as.factor(plots),
    rows   = as.factor(rows),
    cols   = as.factor(cols)
  )

str(fb)
#view(fb)

```
